primary_function: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.

authoritative: Anthropic brand colors and color codes

suggested_aec_gates: Verify all color codes match Anthropic brand specifications exactly
Confirm Poppins font is specified for headings with Arial fallback
Confirm Lora font is specified for body text with Georgia fallback
Ensure accent colors cycle through orange (#d97757), blue (#6a9bcc), and green (#788c5d)
Validate dark color (#141413) and light color (#faf9f5) usage follows brand guidelines
Verify typography hierarchy is preserved during styling application
Ensure font fallback strategies are properly implemented
Confirm visual styling stays within Anthropic brand identity boundaries
trigger_text: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to any sort of artifact that may benefit from having Anthropic's look-and-feel. Use it when brand colors or style guidelines, visual formatting, or company design standards apply.
